sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61529" key="lagoktone/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λᾰγο-κτονέω</orth>, <sense id="n61529.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">kill hares,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.11</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
